Dean: This next exercise I call, The Seven Levels Deep. And I would bet to say this has made a
bigger impact than any tool I'll teach and maybe any other thing I've ever done. I wrote
it in my book. I teach it in all my master minds. I teach it on stage. I share it with
everybody I love, everybody I care about. Because it anchored me in my soul of why I do
what it is that I do.
Why do I wanna gain capabilities? Why do I want more success? Why do I wanna
achieve more? Most people really don't know. They know on the surface level. And,
when you can go from a surface level, from a mind thing, from thoughts on why you
wanna be successful, to anchoring it in your heart with feelings and emotions, there's no
stopping you.
This is an exercise you need to do, but plus one, you're probably gonna wanna do in
your group. You see, about 10 years ago, I hired a guy named Joe Stump. And, I hired
him because he just got massive results for his students. And, I wanted more results for
my students. I wanted to scale my business. I wanted more people to take action on
what is I taught. Some people would get this course. Not you, because you're here
learning.
But, some people buy a course and don't even get into it. I want them to take massive
action. So, when I hired him, I think it was 10 grand for half a day. He got there, and he
said; Why did you hire me? I said; Because, I wanna scale my business, and I want
people to take action. I want more people to have results. And, he said; Well, the easiest
thing to do is The Seven Levels of Deep exercise. I go; Okay, give it to me. He's like; No, I
wanna go through it.
That's what I wanna do with you right now. I wanna take you through this exercise. But,
simultaneously, I'm gonna show you what my answers were over 10 years ago. That's
what an impact it left on me, because it changed everything. My life has never been the
same since I've done this exercise. It's such a gift to give to your attendees. It's such a
gift for you.
So, if you were with me right now, if you and I were sitting together face-to-face, and I
was doing The Seven Levels Deep Exercise, the tool's right on this page. You can look at
it the same time here. You can see my examples. And, I said to you; Why did you buy
this course? Why do you want to do Masterminds? Why do you want financial freedom
in your life? You might tell me an answer.
Let me just tell you. He said to me; Why'd you hire me? I said; To scale my business, and
get more people to take action. And, The Seven Levels Deep is basically this, it's asking
why you want your previous answer, and why it's important to you. The process is, the
more you ask, why, from the previous answer, you get less in here, and you end up
landing in your heart.
There'll be a moment as you go through this, you'll feel it like a thud into your heart. My
physiology changed. I had goosebumps when I got to my real, why. And, when I figured
it out, I would chew through a brick wall. I would bend steel. I would dig a ditch. I'd fight.

I knew what it was like to not have lunch money. I knew what it was like to live in a

wanna go back to watching my parents do nothing but talk about money, and stress
about money. I don't wanna stay at the Motel 6. I like my lifestyle.
And, at that moment, I felt that in my heart like; I'm never going backwards. I hired an
Accountant Consultant for 10 grand to tell me how to scale my business. And now, I'm
saying I hired him. He's there because I don't wanna ever go backwards. I have an
internal fear of going backwards. It exposed itself at that moment. I'm like; I'm done. I
never wanna go backwards. But, I was only on level three.
He said to me; Dean. And, he went through all of them. You wanted to scale your
business. You wanna make an bigger impact. You wanna set some new standard. You
wanna leave a legacy. You wanna not go backwards. Why do you wanna not go
backwards? I was like; Wow! And then, all of a sudden, if you have children, you know
what I'm saying. I thought of my children, and I started to cry. And, I said; Because I
want my kids to have choices.
I don't wanna raise entitled brats. The world doesn't need two more of that. I wanted
my kids to have the choices I didn't have, to have the freedom to go after their goals and
their dreams. As long as they go after it, and they have the fight in them, I wanna
support them and give them choices. And, I thought about that. All of a sudden, I'm
feeling inspired. I'm feeling empowered like I never had this in my heart. I literally have
tears coming out of my eyes.
And I thought, that's it, my kids. And, he said; But Dean, that's only six. I have one more
time to ask you. He went through all of them again. And he said; Why do you want your
kids to have choices? And, that's when my true, my number one, why, popped out, the
one I remember to this day. The one I revisit almost every day. I said; I wanna be in
control of my life.
And, what that meant is, not a control freak. But, my parents were married nine times
when I was a kid. I moved ... my mom five times, my dad four. True story. I moved 19
times by the time I was 20. I never felt in control. I lived in a house, new step-parents,
step-grandparents, step-brothers and sisters. New school, new bike, new Cul de sac, and
then it'll be gone. And then, another house'll be gone. And then, a trailer park, and be
gone.
I moved in with my dad. Lived in the bathroom with him for a while. And then, we
moved. There was all this uncertainty in my life, and I realized at the moment, the
reason I wanted to be an entrepreneur. The reason I wanted to be in control. I hired this
guy to help me scale my business, now, I have tears coming out of my eyes. And, I'm
saying; I wanna be in control because I wanna live the way that I wanna live. I wanna
dress the way I wanna dress. If I wanna wear a T-shirt, I will. I wanna raise my kids the
way I wanna raise them.
